title: EQ - Button to change preset is present
scenario: Verify that the EQ settings screen displays a preset change button below the headline with "Bass" selected as the default preset.
steps: 1. Navigate to the EQ settings screen.
2. Locate the headline on the EQ settings screen.
3. Check for a button below the headline that allows changing the preset.
4. Verify that the button is present.
5. Observe the default preset displayed on the button.
6. Confirm that the default preset is set to "Bass".
expected: The EQ settings screen displays a button below the headline to change the preset, and the default preset is set to "Bass".
